articles.title: DeFi's new front: VerifiedX bets bitcoin's next chapter is programmable, private
articles.description: VerifiedX says its Bitcoin sidechain enables programmable, privacy-preserving transactions without synthetic wrappers, targeting growing institutional demand for native DeFi on the original blockchain system.

articles.title: Japan's SBI Securities, Rakuten Securities plan to offer crypto investment trusts
articles.description: Another 11 companies responded to a survey saying they would consider offering crypto funds once the regulatory environment becomes clear.

articles.title: SBI, Rakuten, Nomura line up to launch crypto investment trusts: Report
articles.description: Japan’s biggest brokerages are racing to bring crypto investment trusts to retail investors, as regulators move to formally allow crypto-holding funds by 2028.

articles.title: Bitcoin slides below $79K on macro fears: Can fixed-income outflows save it?
articles.description: While macro pain and Iran war uncertainty drag Bitcoin below $79K, fixed-income market outflows could trigger a medium-term Bitcoin rebound.

articles.title: Italy’s largest bank more than doubles crypto holdings to $235M in Q1: Report
articles.description: Intesa Sanpaolo grew its crypto holdings from $100 million to $235 million in Q1 2026, making first-time moves into Ethereum and XRP while nearly exiting Solana entirely.

articles.title: A Russian stablecoin built to dodge sanctions says it can survive even if they're lifted
articles.description: A7A5, the Russia-linked stablecoin built to move money around banking restrictions, says faster trade settlement, yield and regional crypto infrastructure could keep it relevant even if geopolitical tensions ease.

articles.title: Michael Saylor floated Bitcoin sales idea to avoid 'impairing' the asset
articles.description: Strategy executive chairman Michael Saylor said that continuing to use the “never sell” Bitcoin mantra could ultimately undermine the very asset his company is built around.
